item.description:
Release v4.6.0

Changes since v4.5.2

  • feat: add plugin stage declaration and display in settings
  • feat(availability): restore LLM provider availability checking
  • feat(llm): enrich streaming errors with HTTP status code and response details
  • feat(menubar): restore inactive icon by default, activate on caffeinate/update events
  • feat(plugin): add VideoConverterPlugin for video format conversion
  • feat(video-plugin): add i18n support and localization tests
  • fix(llm): include raw response preview in parse error messages
  • fix(theme): resolve system appearance via UserDefaults to avoid window appearance pollution
  • fix(theme): system theme retains previous fixed appearance after switch
  • refactor(conversation-list): replace List with ScrollView+LazyVStack
  • refactor(theme): merge VS Code dark/light plugins into single ThemeVscodePlugin with auto theme
